children.text: A floor equal to $2,000,000 divided by the total of the amount available under this subsection for all such allotments for the fiscal year.

children.text: A floor of 70 percent of the proportion for the State for fiscal year 1999.

children.heading: Cumulative ceiling of 45 percent above FY 1999 proportion
children.label: iv Cumulative ceiling of 45 percent above FY 1999 proportion
children.text: A ceiling of 145 percent of the proportion for the State for fiscal year 1999.

children.text: To the extent that the application of subparagraph (A) would result in the sum of the proportions of the allotments for all subsection (b) States exceeding 1.0, the Secretary shall establish a maximum percentage increase in such proportions for all subsection (b) States for the fiscal year in a manner so that such sum equals 1.0.

children.label: ii Allocation of surplus through pro rata increase
children.text: To the extent that the application of subparagraph (A) would result in the sum of the proportions of the allotments for all subsection (b) States being less than 1.0, the proportions of such allotments (as computed before the application of floors under clauses (i), (ii), and (iii) of subparagraph (A)) for all subsection (b) States shall be increased in a pro rata manner (but not to exceed the ceiling established under subparagraph (A)(iv)) so that (after the application of such floors and ceiling) such sum equals 1.0.

children.text: This paragraph shall not be construed as applying to (or taking into account) amounts of allotments redistributed under subsection (f).

children.text: The term “proportion” means, with respect to the allotment of a subsection (b) State for a fiscal year, the amount of the allotment of such State under this subsection for the fiscal year divided by the total of the amount available under this subsection for all such allotments for the fiscal year.

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: 1 Establishment
children.text: There is hereby established in the Treasury of the United States a fund which shall be known as the “Child Enrollment Contingency Fund” (in this subsection referred to as the “Fund”). Amounts in the Fund shall be available without further appropriations for payments under this subsection.

children.heading: Aggregate cap
children.label: B Aggregate cap
children.text: The total amount available for payment from the Fund for each of fiscal years 2010 through 2014, 2016, 2018 through 2022, and 2024 through 2028 (and for each of the semi-annual allotment periods for fiscal years 2015, 2017, 2023, and 2029), taking into account deposits made under subparagraph (C), shall not exceed 20 percent of the amount made available under subsection (a) for the fiscal year or period.

children.heading: Investment of Fund
children.label: C Investment of Fund
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall invest, in interest bearing securities of the United States, such currently available portions of the Fund as are not immediately required for payments from the Fund. The income derived from these investments constitutes a part of the Fund.

children.label: D Availability of excess funds for performance bonuses

children.heading: Application to commonwealths and territories
children.label: G Application to commonwealths and territories
children.text: No payment shall be made under this paragraph to a commonwealth or territory described in subsection (c)(3) until such time as the Secretary determines that there are in effect methods, satisfactory to the Secretary, for the collection and reporting of reliable data regarding the enrollment of children described in subparagraphs (A) and (B) in order to accurately determine the commonwealth’s or territory’s eligibility for, and amount of payment, under this paragraph.
